evals.prompt: Open wiki-root.toml and ask what fields are valid for the [nim] table.
evals.expected_output: Lists embed_model, base_url, api_key_env, batch_size, request_timeout_secs, rerank_model, retry.

evals.prompt:
Validate this wiki-root.toml and report errors: [w]
path = "/x"
[w.nim]
embed_model = "nvidia/bogus"
